# Store Listing — [APP NAME]

> Copy this file to `docs/{app_name}/STORE-LISTING.md` and fill in every section.
> See `06-STORE-PUBLISHING.md` (which is NOT this file) for the full publishing
> process, privacy policy, data safety, and content rating walkthrough.

---

## Google Play Store

**App name** (max 30 chars):
> [App Name]

**Short description** (max 80 chars):
> [One sentence. Mention "free" and "no ads".]

**Full description** (max 4000 chars):
```
[App Name] is a free, ad-free [what it does].

[2-3 sentences about the core features and who it's for.]

FEATURES:
• [Feature 1]
• [Feature 2]
• [Feature 3]
• Completely free — no ads, no tracking, no data collection
• Works offline — no internet required
• Accessible — supports screen readers and large text

This app is part of a collection of free utilities built in the spirit of early internet shareware. No tricks, no subscriptions, just a useful tool made with care.
```

**Category:** [Education / Tools / Productivity / etc.]

**Tags/Keywords:** [comma, separated, keywords, for, discovery]
